steps.description: Click the language selection button (flag icon) in the top-right corner of the Visual Studio Code welcome screen to open the language options.
Click the "Extensions" icon in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Extensions panel.
Type text 'm365 agents toolkit' into the search input field in the Extensions: Marketplace panel of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension entry in the Visual Studio Code Extensions Marketplace sidebar, directly below the search bar after searching for "m365 agents toolkit".
@assertion All contents in the DETAILS tab can be displayed normally.
